name: pdfapihub
description: The complete PDF toolkit — generate, convert, merge, split, compress, lock, unlock, watermark, sign, OCR, parse, scan, and manage files. 30+ tools. Powered by PDFAPIHub.
author: PdfApiHub

apiKey.description: PDFAPIHub API key (required). Get a free key at https://pdfapihub.com. This key authenticates requests to pdfapihub.com/api. Files you process are sent to PDFAPIHub's servers.
